sample-project-phase2/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and modernize the framework stack.
sample-project-phase2/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and introduces breaking API changes (Jakarta EE namespace); keeping 2.6.3 would cause dependency conflicts and prevent usage of Java 21 features managed by the parent.

sample-project-phase2/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
sample-project-phase2/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build would target Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially failing if the project enforces strict JDK version checks.

sample-project-phase2/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated MySQL Connector artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID.
sample-project-phase2/pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with newer Spring Boot 3.x dependency management; the new artifact 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is required for successful resolution.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: Import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest fails to resolve on Java 21 with Spring Boot 3, which uses the jakarta.* namespace instead of javax.*.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; using it results in ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime, or compilation errors if the old API is not on the classpath.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements in Spring Boot 3.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: Compilation error: package javax.servlet.http does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x which relies on Jakarta EE 9+ APIs.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with modern Spring Security 6 configuration style.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors or runtime failures in Spring Boot 3.x.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from fluent API to lambda DSL.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The fluent API methods like authorizeRequests() and formLogin() without lambdas are deprecated/removed in Spring Security 6, requiring lambda-based configuration for compilation.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Replace antMatchers with requestMatchers in authorization rules.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: antMatchers is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7 and removed in Spring Security 6, requiring replacement with requestMatchers for compilation.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Update formLogin configuration to use lambda DSL.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The old formLogin() fluent API is deprecated/removed in Spring Security 6, requiring lambda-based configuration for compilation.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Update logout configuration to use lambda DSL.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The old logout() fluent API is deprecated/removed in Spring Security 6, requiring lambda-based configuration for compilation.

sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.general_idea: Migrate annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.
sample-project-phase2/src/main/java/es/c.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Spring Boot 3 / Java 21 environments; using it causes a compile error (cannot find symbol).
